column_key.name: fingerprint entry label
column_key.status_code: 0 means the local proof command finished successfully

column_key.body_sha256: SHA256 hash of the canonical runtime-proof fingerprint payload

fixture_window.notes: Two consecutive local validation runs against the same branch state; run 1 performed a full image build and run 2 rebuilt the same image deterministically.
